title: Rewrite Report v1
description: Result of a gated rewrite. gate=declined implies text=null (verifier-enforced).

gate.description: Outcome of the legitimacy gate. 'conditional' = rewritten, but the same visible behavior may still occur under provider policy and the report says so.

gate_reason.description: Required prose when gate != passed: why conditional, or why declined.

text.description: The rewritten prompt. null when gate=declined.

technique.description: Technique id from the Knowledge Engine; null for mechanical edits.

notices.description: Fixed notices emitted with the rewrite; texts live in the Knowledge Engine notices file.
